author.bio: #IPFS Core Dev, creator David DM http://david-dm.org, co-creator & organiser @NodeBotsUK & @MeteorLondon meetups. Owner TABLEFLIP https://tableflip.io
author.name: Alan Shaw

content.text: Saturday is treat day 🍭...but we couldn't wait that long to tell you that JS #IPFS v0.33 is shipping with a brand new Web UI 🕹. Install it now `npm i ipfs@0.33.0-rc.1` and tell us what you think! All the infos: https://github.com/ipfs/js-ipfs/issues/1635
content.html: Saturday is treat day 🍭...but we couldn't wait that long to tell you that JS #IPFS v0.33 is shipping with a brand new Web UI 🕹. Install it now `npm i ipfs@0.33.0-rc.1` and tell us what you think! All the infos: https://github.com/ipfs/js-ipfs/issues/1635
